name: Runway ML
data_egress_concerns: Video footage uploaded for editing or generation may contain confidential scenes or unreleased product visuals
Images used as generation seeds may contain proprietary designs or trademarked assets
Text prompts may describe internal projects, unreleased campaigns, or confidential narrative concepts
Generated video content may be mistaken for authentic footage, creating brand risk
training_use_default: Free and standard tier content may be used for model improvement. Enterprise tier provides contractual exclusions from training. Review Runway's current privacy policy for opt-out details.
